heatmapRecoveryMapTitle.desc: Large header title at the top of the Recovery Map (activity heatmap) screen.

heatmapSubtitleLastYear.en: Last 365 days · A quiet record of the days you showed up.
heatmapSubtitleLastYear.desc: Subtitle under the Recovery Map title for users who have been recording for a year or more.

heatmapSubtitleSinceStart.en: Since you began · A quiet record of the days you showed up.
heatmapSubtitleSinceStart.desc: Subtitle under the Recovery Map title for users who began recording less than a year ago.

heatmapFilterAll.desc: Filter chip on the Recovery Map showing entries from all categories.

heatmapFilterCravings.desc: Filter chip on the Recovery Map for craving log entries (plural).

heatmapFilterThoughts.desc: Filter chip / section label on the Recovery Map for logged thought entries.

heatmapFilterMovement.desc: Filter chip / section label on the Recovery Map for movement/activity entries.

heatmapStatCareDays.desc: Summary card stat label: number of days the user logged any self-care entry.

heatmapStatTotalCheckIns.desc: Summary card stat label: total number of check-in entries logged.

heatmapStatMostUsed.desc: Summary card stat label: the category the user logged most often.

heatmapStatThisMonth.desc: Summary card stat label: number of check-ins logged in the current calendar month.

heatmapSeeFullYear.desc: Tappable link that expands the Recovery Map to show all 12 months.

heatmapShowLess.desc: Tappable link that collapses the Recovery Map back to the most recent two months.

heatmapDowMon.desc: Single-letter day-of-week initial for Monday in the calendar grid header.

heatmapDowTue.desc: Single-letter day-of-week initial for Tuesday in the calendar grid header.

heatmapDowWed.desc: Single-letter day-of-week initial for Wednesday in the calendar grid header.

heatmapDowThu.desc: Single-letter day-of-week initial for Thursday in the calendar grid header.

heatmapDowFri.desc: Single-letter day-of-week initial for Friday in the calendar grid header.

heatmapDowSat.desc: Single-letter day-of-week initial for Saturday in the calendar grid header.

heatmapDowSun.desc: Single-letter day-of-week initial for Sunday in the calendar grid header.

heatmapLegendBeforeBegan.desc: Legend label for calendar tiles dated before the user's recovery start date.

heatmapLegendNoEntry.desc: Legend label for calendar tiles on days with no logged entry.

heatmapDayNoEntryTitle.desc: Heading in the day-detail bottom sheet when no entries exist for the tapped day.

heatmapDayQuietCounts.desc: Reassuring subtitle in the day-detail bottom sheet when no entries exist for that day.

heatmapSectionCravingSupport.desc: Section header in the day-detail bottom sheet grouping logged craving entries.

heatmapEntryFallback.desc: Placeholder text shown for a journal entry in the day-detail sheet when the entry has no text body.

heatmapThoughtFallback.desc: Placeholder shown for a logged thought in the day-detail sheet when the thought has no text; {type} is the thought tone identifier (e.g. negative).

heatmapDayShowedUp.en: You showed up for yourself today.
heatmapDayShowedUp.desc: Encouraging closing line in the day-detail bottom sheet when entries exist for that day.
